title: Harvey & Mason Set Of 10 Luxury Eco-Friendly Christmas Crackers White And Silver Snowflake Design Xmas Table Decoration
features: WHAT'S INCLUDED: The box includes 10 luxury Christmas Crackers in a large variety of colours and patterns. Each cracker measures: 14"/35cm. Each pack contains 10 individual crackers.
ECO: Be kind not just to one another this Christmas but to the environment too. Our Crackers have been made from recyclable materials with no plastic contents.
CHRISTMAS CRACKERS: The magic of Christmas begins when the whole family gathers around the Christmas table. Make this time unforgettable for your loved ones with these beautiful Christmas crackers.

TRADITIONAL DESIGN: These stunning white and silver Christmas crackers showcase an enchanting winter snowflake design. Each cracker is beautifully decorated with delicate snowflakes, adding a touch of elegance and festive charm to your holiday celebrations. Perfect for creating a magical and memorable Christmas atmosphere.
GIFTS INCLUDED: Each cracker contains a novelty, hat, motto, and snap. These beautiful crackers are perfect for keeping all the family entertained around the Christmas table.
description: Product Description CHRISTMAS : Add the final touches to your Christmas dining table this festive period with these exquisite Christmas crackers, guaranteed fun for all the family. WHAT'S INCLUDED: Each box includes 10 luxury Christmas Crackers, finished with a ribbon. Each cracker is filled with a gift, hat and motto. GIFTS INCLUDED : Each cracker contains a novelty, hat, motto, and snap. These beautiful crackers are perfect for keeping all the family entertained around the Christmas table. MEASUREMENTS: Each cracker measures: 30.48cm/12inch.
